summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 5.77% today, the main contract closed at 743.The traders' willingnessto ship is general. The steel mills are not active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.
